projects.title: Student Performance & Activity Tracking System
projects.description: Developed a secure role-based student management system handling 500+ records. Optimized API performance by 65% using indexing and caching. Built 10+ dashboards reducing manual reporting effort by 70%.

projects.title: Banking Web Application
projects.description: Built a banking system supporting account creation, deposits, withdrawals, and balance tracking. Implemented authentication and optimized SQL queries improving database performance by 30%.

projects.title: AgroVision - Weed Detection System
projects.description: Final year project using computer vision to detect weeds in agricultural fields. Improved crop monitoring efficiency using deep learning and image processing techniques.

projects.title: Data Analytics Dashboards
projects.description: Designed and developed 10+ interactive dashboards for data visualization and reporting using Power BI. Automated workflows and improved decision-making efficiency.

projects.title: Portfolio Website
projects.description: Built a dynamic personal portfolio using React, Tailwind CSS, and Framer Motion with smooth animations and responsive design.
